default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard and train Bruno Santilli as a new team member, focusing on email management, calendar organization, and sales processes.](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bruno gained access to Marcel's email and calendar, with instructions to draft follow-up emails for upcoming meetings](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Implemented a color-coding system for calendar events (blue for prospects, acting, and client)](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Discussed sales qualification process, emphasizing the need for flexibility in the current phase](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [Explored tools like Perplexity and ChatGPT for gathering company information and creating sales call scripts](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)

## Topics

### Email and Calendar Access

  - [Bruno received access to Marcel's email and calendar](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Instructed to draft follow-up emails as Marcel, copying himself, and save as drafts for review](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Color-coding system for calendar: blue for prospects, acting, and client](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Emphasis on adding detailed notes to calendar events for context](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)

### Sales Qualification Process

  - [Introduced "crop, walk, run" sales process for qualifying leads](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Stressed the importance of not over-rigidly applying the process to avoid disqualifying good leads](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Discussed the need for more context in meeting notes, including company information and attendee backgrounds](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### AI Tools for Sales Preparation

  - [Demonstrated use of Perplexity and ChatGPT for gathering company information](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Created a system for building a library of sales call scripts using AI and transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
  - [Explored ways to use AI for pre-call research and highlighting potential client pain points](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)

### Team Roles and Responsibilities

  - [Jimmy identified as capable of running demos and managing accounts](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [Kyle oversees all accounts, focusing on people management](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [Discussed the potential for decentralizing expertise away from Marcel to build a stronger team identity](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)

### Ongoing Training and Development

  - [Bruno expressed interest in further training on tools like SemRush](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Discussed the importance of maintaining a casual, open-ended approach in initial client communications](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bruno to draft follow-up emails for upcoming meetings and save as drafts for Marcel's review](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Continue building a library of sales call scripts using AI and meeting transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
  - [Explore further integration of AI tools like Perplexity for pre-call research](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Bruno to familiarize himself with SemRush and other relevant tools](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Work on decentralizing expertise and building a stronger team identity for growth X](https://fathom.video/share/xaYRBZiL383WzvvP6uqvK4muLs5bVoRf?tab=summary&timestamp=2786.0)

action_items.description: Organize Marcel's inbox emails into folders (alerts, clients)
Review calendar, follow up w/ non-responders to meeting invites
Draft follow-up emails for meetings, save as drafts for Marcel review
Add detailed notes to calendar events (LinkedIn, company info)
Create Ateo opportunities for confirmed, legit meetings
Add Jimmy to legitimate meeting invites as appropriate
